LamBox.Empty:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Empty
      constructors:

Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Nat
      constructors:
        zero (0 arg(s))
        suc (1 arg(s))

Irr.Vec:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Vec
      constructors:
        Ֆ5bՖՖ5dՖ (0 arg(s))
        Ֆ_Ֆcons_ (3 arg(s))

Irr.map:
  constant declaration:
    body: μrec [0] :=
            0: λ _ _ _ _ _ →
                 case<Irr.Vec{0},0> @0 of
                   λ<[]> Irr.Vec{0}{0}
                   λ<[_, _, _]> Irr.Vec{0}{1} □ (@4 @1) (@8 □ □ □ @4 @0)

Irr.xs:
  constant declaration:
    body: Irr.Vec{0}{1} □
            (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1} Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0})
            (Irr.Vec{0}{1} □ Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{0} Irr.Vec{0}{0})

Irr.test:
  constant declaration:
    body: Irr.map □ □ □ (λ _ → Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1} @0) (Irr.xs)
main program: [Irr.test]
